title: Full Bright +
description: This client side Minecraft Fabric mod improves visibility on multiplayer servers by letting you press G to remove darkness H to clear fog and J to open your settings menu.
body:
Fullbright & No Fog is a lightweight, client-side utility mod designed to give you perfect visibility in any environment. Whether you're exploring deep caves, navigating the Nether, or recording survival gameplay, this mod removes all darkness and distance fog so you never miss a detail.

Default Keybinds:

G — Toggle Fullbright (instantly removes shadows and darkness).

H — Toggle No Fog (clears atmospheric distance fog).

J — Open the Configuration Menu to customize your settings on the fly.

Because it runs entirely client-side, it is perfect for single-player worlds, multiplayer servers, and SMPs.
